title: Book/Magazine Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Book/Magazine Donation Programs 10 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LITTLE FREE LIBRARY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides book-sharing boxes in local neighborhoods. Individuals can take any books available and donate any unwanted reading materials to share with the community. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (715) 690-2488 Visit Website More Details PEACE HOUSE ROGUE LIBERATION LIBRARY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts new or lightly used paperback books (no written notes or highlighting on pages) and sends them by request to all state prisons in the western United States and federal prisons nationwide. Volunteer opportunities are available. 543 S Mountain Avenue Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 482-9625 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 13207 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 1:15pm-3:45pm Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE SAINT VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE THRIFT AND CONSIGNMENT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated household items, such as clothing, linens, books, and furniture, also accepts donations of similar items. Limited dontation pick up is available. 51661 Huntington Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Monday -Saturday 10am- until capacity is reached Email (541) 536-1956 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts year-round donations of non-perishable food, unused personal hygiene products, new or gently used linens, blankets, towels, pillows, adult winter clothing, coats, shoes, underwear, socks and books. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm Email (503) 488-7745 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEACE HOUSE ROGUE LIBERATION LIBRARY PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION DONATION PROGRAM PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION DONATION PROGRAM ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE THRIFT STORE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING
